---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Caption AI
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Motivation

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve.
Ex: "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

- Screenshots, mockups, or examples from other tools
- Links to relevant discussions or issues
- Impact: How many users would benefit?
